name: Feynman Mode evaluates an explanation and returns color-coded gap analysis
description: The user selects a topic, writes an explanation, submits it, and receives an AI gap analysis with color-coded segments (green/amber/red) plus at least one probing follow-up question — confirming the evaluation pipeline actually ran.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Feynman Mode link in the sidebar
Select a topic from the topic selector
Type an explanation of at least 80 characters into the explanation editor
Click the button that submits the explanation for AI evaluation

Verify that after loading completes the page shows a gap-analysis result containing visually distinct color-coded segments (green / amber / red classifications) and at least one probing follow-up question — not just an echo of the submitted text and not a perpetual loading state
